pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh (deletion), export_result.sh (ORK_FILE), and verifier.py (scoring path).
Found in setup_task.sh (TASK_ORK), export_result.sh (FALLBACK_ORK), and verifier.py.
Confirmed in verifier.py logic: passed = score >= 60 and key_faults_fixed.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 'A simple model rocket', a real built-in OpenRocket example file created by Sampo Niskanen, which is modified via python in setup_task.sh to synthetically inject a blunt conical nose cone and 50mm length (0.05m). The verifier logic enforces that the new nose cone shape is one of ['ogive', 'haack', 'power', 'parabolic', 'ellipsoid'], the length is >= 0.12m (120mm), and at least one simulation has an 'uptodate' status. The agent must save the optimized rocket to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/optimized_nosecone_rocket.ork and write a trade study report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/nosecone_trade_study.txt. The pass threshold of 60 requires both reaching the score and fixing the three key faults.
